file_summary: This Makefile defines targets for building, installing, uninstalling, cleaning, and releasing a Go application named 'lup'.

symbols.name: lines_1_40
symbols.summary: This section provides an overview of the Makefile targets and defines variables for build configuration.

symbols.name: lines_36_75
symbols.summary: This section defines the 'build' target, which compiles the Go application for the current platform.

symbols.name: lines_71_110
symbols.summary: This section defines the 'uninstall' target, which removes the installed binary from the installation directory.

symbols.name: lines_106_144
symbols.summary: This section defines the 'release' target, which cross-compiles the application for multiple platforms and outputs binaries to the 'dist' directory.

symbols.name: BINARY
symbols.summary: The name of the output binary file.

symbols.name: CMD
symbols.summary: The command to build, pointing to the main package directory.

symbols.name: VERSION
symbols.summary: The version string derived from Git tags, or 'dev' if not available.

symbols.name: BUILD_TIME
symbols.summary: The build timestamp in UTC format.

symbols.name: LDFLAGS
symbols.summary: Linker flags for embedding version and build time into the binary.

symbols.name: INSTALL_DIR
symbols.summary: The directory where the binary will be installed, defaulting to ~/.local/bin.

symbols.name: CONFIG_DIR
symbols.summary: The directory for the configuration file.

symbols.name: DIST
symbols.summary: The directory where release binaries are stored.
